findings.message: Python projects must enforce a coverage gate of at least 85
Python projects must audit dependencies (pip-audit or uv audit) in CI
Python projects must declare a DRY check
Python projects must verify formatting (ruff format --check or black --check) in CI
Python projects must run a linter (ruff check) in CI
Python projects must declare mutation testing (mutmut or cosmic-ray)
Python projects must run tests (pytest) in CI
Python projects must run a typechecker (ty, mypy, or pyright) in CI
CI must run a Slophammer checker when slophammer.yml is present
